overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark forest at night, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp. The camera moves steadily along a winding dirt path surrounded by dense trees and underbrush, consistent with survival game engine footage.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a dense forest at night. A flashlight illuminates a narrow dirt path flanked by large tree trunks and thick underbrush. The camera moves steadily forward between the towering trees as the beam of light reveals the winding trail ahead.

segments.scene_description: The walk continues through the enclosed forest trail as the camera passes the initial framing trees. A prominent tree trunk appears on the right side while dense underbrush lines both sides of the path. The flashlight beam continues to illuminate the dirt trail ahead as the journey progresses deeper into the woods.

thick bushes and undergrowth on the right side

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the dark forest with the flashlight revealing a noticeable rock formation on the left side of the path. The trail remains narrow and enclosed by dense vegetation as the camera maintains its steady forward movement through the nighttime woodland environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense, nocturnal forest as the camera pushes deeper into an enclosed woodland environment. It begins by moving steadily along a narrow dirt path, where a flashlight beam cuts through the darkness to reveal towering tree trunks and thick underbrush. As the camera passes the initial framing trees, the path remains tightly hemmed in by dense vegetation and a prominent tree trunk on the right. The scene then progresses further into the woods, with the light shifting to uncover a noticeable rock formation on the left side of the trail. Finally, the camera maintains its forward momentum, continuing through the oppressive darkness of the nighttime forest.
